caption: A man with a shaved head and a dark beard is recorded in a studio setting against a wall of grey, ribbed acoustic foam. He wears black over-ear headphones and a white t-shirt featuring a logo that reads "Scary" above "Justice" and "MINE PODCAST" below. Positioned in front of him is a professional silver microphone mounted on a black boom arm. Across the sequence, the man remains seated, looking slightly to his left. He begins with a small, closed-mouth smile that gradually widens into an open-mouthed expression, showing his teeth as he appears to be speaking or reacting to something off-camera. His head shifts slightly in position while his gaze remains fixed in the same direction, maintaining a consistent, cheerful expression throughout the brief interaction.
